title: Search hotels by location and book a hotel successfully
description: Verifies a user can search hotels by a valid location, book from results, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a hotel card

title: Search hotels with a location that has no matches shows a no-results message
description: Verifies the hotels search shows a clear no-results state when there are no matching hotels for a location.

title: Search hotels with empty location does not show results and prompts user (validation)
description: Verifies the Hotels search does not proceed with an empty location and provides a visible validation or empty-state message.

title: Search hotels with leading/trailing spaces in location returns results
description: Verifies the Hotels search handles whitespace around the location input and still shows matching results.

title: Booking a hotel shows success snackbar and remains on Search page
description: Verifies booking from a hotel card displays a success snackbar and does not navigate away from the Search page (since booking happens on Search).

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a hotel card

title: After booking a hotel, booking appears in Booking History
description: Verifies a booked hotel is persisted and visible in the Booking History page.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a hotel card
Click on the "Booking History" link in the navigation

title: Write Review option is offered after a successful hotel booking (if present)
description: Verifies the UI offers a visible "Write Review" option after booking when the feature is enabled.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a hotel card

title: Search flights and book successfully (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can search flights by From/To, book a result, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a flight card

title: Flight search shows no-results message when there are no matches
description: Verifies the Flights tab displays a clear no-results state when a search returns zero flights.

title: Booking a flight shows a success snackbar (UI confirmation)
description: Verifies that clicking Book on a flight result triggers a visible success snackbar confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a flight card

title: Booked flight appears in Booking History
description: Verifies that after booking a flight from search results, the booking is visible in the Booking History page.

steps.description: Click on the "Book" button on a flight card

title: Flight results update when changing destination
description: Verifies the flight results list updates when the user changes the To field value.

title: Flight search is case-insensitive for From/To inputs
description: Verifies that using lowercase input still returns results (where matches exist).

title: Entering only From does not show flight results (validation/empty search state)
description: Verifies that providing only one search field does not display results and shows a helpful empty/validation state.

title: Entering only To does not show flight results (validation/empty search state)
description: Verifies that providing only destination does not display results and shows a helpful empty/validation state.

title: Submit a hotel review successfully and see confirmation
description: Verifies a user can submit a hotel review with rating and comment and receives visible confirmation (snackbar or list update).

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Set rating to 4 stars in the rating component
Type "Great stay, clean rooms." into the comment field

title: Submitted review appears in the reviews list for the selected hotel
description: Verifies that after submitting a review, the new comment is visible in the reviews list (or otherwise confirmed on-screen).

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Set rating to 5 stars in the rating component
Type "Amazing service and location." into the comment field
Verify text "Amazing service and location." is visible

title: Validation: missing rating shows a visible error snackbar
description: Verifies that submitting a review without selecting a rating shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Type "Nice place." into the comment field
Verify text "Rating is required" is visible

title: Validation: missing comment shows a visible error snackbar
description: Verifies that submitting a review without entering a comment shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Set rating to 3 stars in the rating component
Verify text "Comment is required" is visible

title: Validation: missing hotel selection prevents submission
description: Verifies that clicking Submit Review without selecting a hotel shows a visible validation error and does not submit.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Set rating to 4 stars in the rating component
Type "Decent overall." into the comment field
Verify text "Hotel is required" is visible

title: Error recovery: after validation error, user can correct inputs and submit successfully
description: Verifies the user can fix missing fields after an error and successfully submit a review.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Verify text "Rating is required" is visible
Set rating to 4 stars in the rating component
Type "Updated after error, now complete." into the comment field

title: Keyboard submission: pressing Enter in comment field submits when all fields are valid
description: Verifies Enter key can trigger submission from the comment input when hotel, rating, and comment are provided.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation
Select a hotel from the hotel dropdown
Set rating to 5 stars in the rating component
Type "Submitting via Enter key." into the comment field

title: Reviews page loads required UI controls for submitting a review
description: Verifies the Reviews page shows the hotel selector, rating component, comment field, and Submit Review button.

steps.description: Click on "Reviews" in the app navigation

title: Submit a flight review successfully and see confirmation
description: Verifies a user can submit a flight review with rating and comment and gets a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown
Click on the rating component to set a rating (for example, 4 stars)
Type "Great flight experience, smooth boarding and on-time arrival." into the comment field

title: Submitted flight review appears in the reviews list
description: Verifies that after submitting a flight review, the review is visible in the on-page list.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown
Click on the rating component to set a rating (for example, 5 stars)
Type "Comfortable seats and friendly crew." into the comment field
Verify text "Comfortable seats and friendly crew." is visible

title: Validation error when rating is missing (comment provided)
description: Verifies submitting a flight review without a rating shows a visible validation error message.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown
Type "Decent flight overall." into the comment field
Verify text "Rating is required" is visible

title: Validation error when comment is missing (rating provided)
description: Verifies submitting a flight review without a comment shows a visible validation error message.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown
Click on the rating component to set a rating (for example, 3 stars)
Verify text "Comment is required" is visible

title: Validation error when both rating and comment are missing
description: Verifies submitting a flight review with neither rating nor comment shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown

title: Cannot submit a flight review without selecting a flight
description: Verifies the user sees a validation error if they try to submit without choosing a flight from the dropdown.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Click on the rating component to set a rating (for example, 4 stars)
Type "Tried to submit without selecting a flight." into the comment field
Verify text "Select a flight" is visible

title: Flight dropdown loads options on the Flights tab
description: Verifies the flight selection dropdown is present and shows at least one selectable option.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation

title: Canceling the rating selection by clearing input is not required; user can adjust rating before submit
description: Verifies a user can change the selected rating before submitting and still submit successfully.

steps.description: Click on the "Reviews" link in the app navigation
Select a flight option from the dropdown
Click on the rating component to set a rating (for example, 2 stars)
Click on the rating component to change the rating (for example, 4 stars)
Type "Updated rating after reconsideration." into the comment field

title: Booking History page URL and heading are correct after navigation
description: Verifies that navigating to Booking History lands on the correct route and shows an identifiable page title/heading.

title: Booking History remains stable when repeatedly visiting the page during a session
description: Verifies that the Booking History page can be opened and revisited without UI breaking and continues to show a consistent state (cards or empty message).

steps.description: Verify either text "No bookings" is visible or at least one booking card element is visible

title: Add a new hotel successfully and see it in the admin list with success snackbar
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can add a hotel via the form and receives visible confirmation plus list update.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel Alpha" into the Name field
Type "https://example.com/hotel-alpha.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Comfortable stay near downtown." into the Description field
Verify text "Test Hotel Alpha" is visible

title: Validation: missing price shows an error snackbar and hotel is not added
description: Verifies the Price field is required and submission without it shows a visible validation error and does not add the hotel.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel NoPrice" into the Name field
Type "https://example.com/noprice.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Should fail validation due to missing price." into the Description field
Verify text "Price is required" is visible
Verify text "Test Hotel NoPrice" is not visible

title: Validation: non-numeric price is rejected with visible error feedback
description: Verifies the form rejects a non-numeric price value and shows visible error feedback without adding the hotel.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel BadPrice" into the Name field
Type "https://example.com/badprice.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Invalid price format test." into the Description field
Verify text "Test Hotel BadPrice" is not visible

title: Validation: empty name shows error feedback and prevents submission
description: Verifies the hotel name is required and the user cannot add a hotel without a name.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "https://example.com/noname.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Missing name should block add." into the Description field

title: Validation: empty location shows error feedback and prevents submission
description: Verifies the location is required and the user cannot add a hotel without a location.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel NoLocation" into the Name field
Type "https://example.com/nolocation.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Missing location should block add." into the Description field

title: Successful add with optional fields left blank still adds hotel and shows success snackbar
description: Verifies the user can add a hotel when Image URL and Description are blank (if optional) and still sees success plus list update.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel Minimal" into the Name field
Type "" into the Image URL field
Verify text "Test Hotel Minimal" is visible

title: After adding a hotel, refresh the admin list view via in-app navigation and confirm it remains visible
description: Verifies the added hotel remains present when leaving the Admin page and returning via navigation (persistence within session).

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Type "Test Hotel Persist" into the Name field
Type "San Diego" into the Location field
Type "https://example.com/persist.jpg" into the Image URL field
Type "Used to verify list refresh via navigation." into the Description field
Click on "Search" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Admin" in the app navigation/menu
Verify text "Test Hotel Persist" is visible

title: Delete an existing hotel and verify success snackbar and removal
description: Verifies an admin can delete a hotel and the UI shows a success confirmation and removes the hotel from the list.

steps.description: Verify a hotel card is visible

title: Confirm delete action shows snackbar confirmation
description: Verifies clicking Delete on a hotel card shows a visible confirmation snackbar after deletion.

steps.description: Verify a hotel card is visible
Verify a snackbar notification is visible

title: Delete removes the correct hotel from the visible list
description: Verifies the specific hotel name on the deleted card is no longer visible in the admin hotel list after deletion.

steps.description: Verify a hotel card is visible
Verify the first visible hotel card name text is visible
Click "Delete" on that same hotel card

title: After deletion, hotel count decreases or list updates
description: Verifies the hotel list visually updates after deletion (card disappears and list reflows).

steps.description: Verify at least two hotel cards are visible
Click "Delete" on one of the hotel cards
Verify the deleted hotel card is no longer visible

title: Delete last remaining hotel card (edge case) shows empty-state behavior
description: Verifies deleting the final hotel results in an updated UI (no hotel cards shown and/or an empty-state message is visible).

steps.description: Verify the admin page hotel list area is visible
Verify no hotel cards are visible

title: Snackbar message indicates deletion success
description: Verifies the snackbar contains success-oriented deletion text after deleting a hotel.

title: Add a new flight successfully and see it listed with success snackbar
description: Verifies an admin can add a flight with all fields completed and sees a success message and the new flight in the list.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item

title: Submit new flight form with all fields filled
description: Verifies the admin flights form accepts valid input across all fields and allows submission.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item
Type "Direct flight for testing" into the "Description" field

title: Newly added flight appears in the admin flights list after submission
description: Verifies the flight list updates to include the newly added flight details after adding a flight.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item
Type "Short hop for list verification" into the "Description" field

title: Price required validation: leave Price empty and see validation snackbar
description: Verifies the add flight form blocks submission when Price is missing and shows a validation error snackbar.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item

title: Do not add flight when Price is missing: ensure flight is not listed
description: Verifies that a flight is not added to the admin list when submission fails due to missing Price.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item
Verify text "ShouldNotExist Air" is not visible

title: Numeric Price input: non-numeric Price is rejected or shows validation feedback
description: Verifies the Price field enforces numeric input or the form shows visible validation feedback when non-numeric text is entered.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item

title: Form remains usable after a validation error and succeeds on retry
description: Verifies the admin can correct a missing Price after seeing an error and then successfully add the flight.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item

title: Flights tab shows the Add Flight form fields
description: Verifies the flights admin UI renders the expected form fields needed to add a flight.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link or menu item

title: Delete a flight from the Flights tab and see confirmation plus removal
description: Verifies an admin can delete an existing flight and the UI confirms deletion and removes the flight from the list.

steps.description: Click "Delete" on a visible flight card

title: Deleted flight is removed from the Flights list after confirmation
description: Verifies that after deleting a flight, the deleted flight card no longer appears in the flights list.

steps.description: Click "Delete" on a visible flight card
Verify the deleted flight card is not visible in the list

title: Delete a flight when the list is scrolled (off-screen items)
description: Verifies delete works for flights further down the list and still shows a deletion confirmation.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the flights list
Click "Delete" on a visible flight card

title: Delete the last visible flight card in the list
description: Verifies deleting a flight at the end of the currently visible list updates the UI cleanly without leaving an empty card.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the flights list
Click "Delete" on the last visible flight card

title: Delete one flight and verify other flight cards remain visible
description: Verifies deleting one flight does not remove or hide other flights from the list.

steps.description: Click "Delete" on a visible flight card
Verify at least one other flight card is visible in the list

title: Authenticated user can open /booking and sees Coming Soon message
description: Verifies the placeholder booking page loads for a logged-in user and displays the Coming Soon message.

steps.description: Click on the "Booking" navigation link/menu item

title: Booking page placeholder is visible and contains no actionable booking controls
description: Verifies the /booking page communicates it is not functional by showing Coming Soon and not exposing booking submission actions.

steps.description: Verify element "Book Now" is not visible

title: Attempting to interact on /booking does not create a booking in history
description: Verifies no booking is performed from the placeholder page by checking booking history does not show a new entry after visiting /booking.

steps.description: Click the "Booking History" navigation link/menu item

title: Booking page remains stable on refresh-like re-entry via navigation
description: Verifies that leaving and re-entering the Booking page via UI navigation still shows the placeholder message consistently.

title: Booking placeholder page does not expose admin inventory actions
description: Verifies the booking placeholder page is limited in scope and does not include admin-like inventory management controls.

steps.description: Verify element "Add Hotel" is not visible

title: Booking placeholder page provides clear status even when reached late in a session
description: Verifies the placeholder message is still visible after visiting other authenticated pages first.
